Title: CREATE INDEX
Feature: CREATE BITMAP INDEX index_name ON table_name (column_list)
Description: Creates an index on one or more columns of a table to speed up data access.
Virtuoso extends CREATE INDEX with clustered and bitmap index options for optimized storage and search patterns.
Examples: CREATE UNIQUE CLUSTERED INDEX idx_user_name ON db.dba.user (u_name);
CREATE BITMAP INDEX idx_article_flags ON article (flags);
